content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_SCG_GAV_Cost
AS

-- drop view v_SCG_GAV_Cost

SELECT			X.*, Y.CostValue as [Cost APR]
FROM
(
SELECT			distinct A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID], MAX([Sales Amt]) as [Sales Amt]
,				MAX([Sales Qty]) as [Sales Qty], MAX(CostValue) as [Cost], MAX(B.Date) as IntercoDate_WBM
FROM
(
SELECT			DF.Division as Division
,				DF.Company as Company
,				AC.Customer as [Customer ID]
,				AC.Name as [Customer Name]
,				ATD.CustomerPoNumber as [Customer PO]
,				ATD.SalesOrder as [Order ID]
,				ATD.InvoiceDate as [Date]
,               DF.Brand AS [Brand]
,				DF.Category as [Product Category]
,				ATD.StockCode as [Part ID]
,				IM.Description as [Part Description]
,				Supplier as [Supplier ID]
,				NetSalesValue as [Sales Amt]
,				QtyInvoiced as [Sales Qty]
,				CostValue/NULLIF(QtyInvoiced,0) as [Cost G]
FROM			SCG.ArTrnSummary ATS
JOIN			SCG.ArTrnDetail ATD on ATS.Invoice = ATD.Invoice
JOIN			SCG.ArCustomer AC on ATS.Customer = AC.Customer
JOIN			SCG.InvMaster IM on ATD.StockCode = IM.StockCode
JOIN			SCA.Division_Family DF on ATD.ProductClass = DF.ProductClass
WHERE			ATD.InvoiceDate >= '2019-01-01'
--AND				DF.Division <> 'Countertop'
and				DF.Company = 'G'
AND				DF.Brand IN ('AVANTI')
AND             NetSalesValue > 0
) A

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Compact' as Division
,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID]
,				MAX(aih.[ref-date]) as [Date]
,				AVG(aii.[total-sales-cost]) as CostValue
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
WHERE			aih.[cust-key] IN ('00066745')
AND             aih.[ref-num] not like 'CM%'
AND				qty > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(aih.[ref-date], 'yyyy-MM'), aii.[item-code]
) B				on A.Company = B.Company and A.Division = B.Division and A.[Part ID] = B.[Part ID]
WHERE			Brand IN ('AVANTI')
AND				ISNULL(B.Date, A.Date) <= A.Date
GROUP BY		A.Division, A.Company, [Customer ID], [Customer Name], [Customer PO], [Order ID]
,				A.Brand, [Product Category], A.[Part ID], [Part Description], [Supplier ID]
) X

JOIN

(
SELECT			'G' as Company
,				'Compact' as Division
,				aii.[item-code] as [Part ID]
,				MAX(aih.[ref-date]) as [Date]
,				AVG(aii.[total-sales-cost]/NULLIF(aii.qty,0)) as CostValue
FROM			APR.arinvhdr aih
JOIN			APR.arinvitm aii on aih.[ref-num] = aii.[ref-num]
WHERE			aih.[cust-key] IN ('00066745')
AND             aih.[ref-num] not like 'CM%'
AND				qty > 0
GROUP BY		FORMAT(aih.[ref-date], 'yyyy-MM'), aii.[item-code]
) Y				on X.Company = Y.Company and X.Division = Y.Division and X.[Part ID] = Y.[Part ID] and X.IntercoDate_WBM = Y.Date
